current_capability.software_claim: MMIO scalar, packed-dot, bounded scratchpad GEMM, and local descriptor-driven DRAM-to-scratchpad tensor prefetch prototype only

descriptor_words: word0: opcode[3:0], stream_to_scratch[8], scratch_offset[21:16], byte_count[29:24], writeback_request[30], valid_owner[31]
word1: stream source byte address when stream_to_scratch is set; scalar OP_A otherwise
word2: scalar OP_B or reserved for streamed GEMM
word3: scalar ACC or reserved for streamed GEMM

queue_depth_semantics.full_ring_encoding: not represented by the current 3-bit head/tail register interface

descriptor_queue_submission.implemented: Read-only four-word descriptor fetch requires word0 valid_owner[31], advances a 3-bit head/tail ring only after accepted execution, launches existing scalar/GEMM datapath operations, optionally streams aligned descriptor-sourced DRAM words into the 64-byte scratchpad, counts read beats/bytes, exposes zero write beats/bytes, rejects writeback_request[30] fail-closed, and faults autonomously on descriptor timeout
descriptor_queue_submission.not_claimed: This is a local RTL prototype path only; it is not an Android NNAPI, coherent IOMMU, production queue-depth, implemented writeback DMA, or phone-class accelerator proof

precision_matrix.path: DOT4_S8 and bounded GEMM_S8 through 64-byte MMIO scratchpad
DOT8_S4 packed dot only; no tensor GEMM/compiler path
no opcode, datapath, compiler lowering, or measured benchmark path
no opcode, datapath, compiler lowering, or measured benchmark path
no opcode, datapath, compiler lowering, or measured benchmark path

runtime_evidence_requirements: Runtime register constants match this manifest
BSP contract header exposes the same NPU perf offsets
Architecture documentation names each manifest perf counter
Descriptor queue registers expose only the local RTL 3-bit ring and must not be treated as production queue-depth or Android accelerator support
DMA tensor streaming evidence must include DESC_BYTES_READ from the measured NPU path and explicitly state that writeback DMA is not implemented
Precision support beyond DOT4_S8, DOT8_S4, and GEMM_S8 must remain blocked until the precision matrix and runtime tests identify the measured path
Verilator GEMM smoke test checks unsupported_ops, cycles, macs, ops, and errors counters
Android HAL/NNAPI acceleration remains blocked without e1_npu_nnapi.proof.json plus VTS/CTS/SELinux evidence
Benchmark evidence must bind model hashes, transcript hashes, perf counters, DMA traces, and CPU fallback accounting

missing_for_phone_class: 160 dense INT8 peak TOPS target evidence
80 dense INT8 sustained TOPS target evidence
512 sparse INT4 peak TOPS target evidence
FP8, BF16, FP16, and INT2 execution
AIDL HAL, VTS, CTS, and SELinux evidence
